name: ALERT@SherrodBrown.com
subject: Renacci is catching up in the polls (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **Peter -- Jim Renacci is catching up in the polls.** | | **_"A new poll commissioned by a liberal think tank shows a close race between Democratic U.S. Sen. Sherrod Brown and GOP U.S. Rep. Jim Renacci. Past polling has shown Brown up by double digits..."_** \-- _Cleveland.com_ ; 9/6/2018
---
How do we stop the slide? **We hit every goal we have between now and Nov. 6th -- including our $327,000 Mid-Month goal on Saturday.**
[**Will you rush in your first contribution of the campaign?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb9/4462dc26/666073b5/20045f6b/2974472566/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180912?refcode=sbe180912_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb9/4462dc26/666073b5/20045f6a/2974472566/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180912?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180912_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb9/4462dc26/666073b5/20045f6a/2974472566/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180912?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180912_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb9/4462dc26/666073b5/20045f6a/2974472566/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180912?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180912_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb9/4462dc26/666073b5/20045f6b/2974472566/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180912?refcode=sbe180912_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
Past polling has shown Sherrod ahead. But this new poll has the closest numbers we've seen yet (with Sherrod at 46% and Renacci at 42%).
You know what happens now Peter. President Trump, Vice President Pence, and their special interest allies will read these polling numbers. Renacci-allied groups can (and probably will) pounce on Sherrod.
And since we're in a post-_Citizens United_ world, they can invest practically whatever they want to make sure Sherrod loses his job.
**The only thing that stands in their way is us.** This is a job we have to take seriously. If we don't, we could lose Sherrod's voice in the Senate.
[**We NEED to reach this goal. Make your first contribution of the campaign right now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb9/4462dc26/666073b5/20045f6b/2974472566/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180912?refcode=sbe180912_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
Thanks!
Team Sherrod

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I just spoke in Cleveland with Barack, Rich, and Betty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | _" Give it up for your outstanding Senator, my former colleague Sherrod Brown.
Love Sherrod Brown."_
_\- President Barack Obama in Cleveland, moments ago_ I just got off stage in Cleveland with President Barack Obama and Ohio's next Governor and Lieutenant Governor, Rich Cordray and Betty Sutton. I'm thrilled to be a part of the strongest slate and deepest bench of candidates Ohio's ever seen. With 54 days to Election Day, we have to be organized. We have to be scrappy. That's where you come in, Peter: [**I 'm personally asking you to chip in to help make sure our campaign has the resources we need to win up-and-down the ticket. Can you chip in $5, $10, or our average online contribution of $26 right now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffbe/4462dc26/6582d343/20044248/133324776/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEzcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180913pm?refcode=sbe180913pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Rich, Betty, and I are in public service because we're committed to fighting like hell for the people who make our country work. We stand up to drug companies and for-profit charter schools and the gun lobby. And we stand with students, seniors, and workers. We're proud to stand with you, and this year, we need you to stand with us. [**With only 4 digits separating me and my opponent in the polls, we need to ramp up our grassroots efforts -- and fast. Can you chip in $5, $10, or our average online contribution of $26 right now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffbe/4462dc26/6582d343/20044248/133324776/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTEzcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180913pm?refcode=sbe180913pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thank you for your support. And thank you to President Barack Obama for joining us in the Buckeye State. Onward, Sherrod Brown

---
| | Peter, **The latest poll from Fox News has us leading the race!** It says that Hoosiers still back President Trump’s plan to drain the swamp and get Indiana families working again. And that is bad news for Sleepin’ Joe. The poll shows Mike taking the lead by 2 percentage points. [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjiuuukk-kujulhlke-j/) Now is the time that we ride this momentum and build a lead that Joe can’t recover from. **[Donate today](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjiuuukk-kujulhlke-t/) and help us compete with Joe’s Chuck Schumer backed advertisement blitz.** **As we leave Joe behind in the polls, we can dry up his fundraising base by posting big numbers of our own.** Donate today by [clicking here](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjiuuukk-kujulhlke-i/) and add $1,000, $500, or even $100 to our victory fund and let’s put Joe away while we can. Ben Mitchell [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjiuuukk-kujulhlke-d/) |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My latest obsession
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
For all. -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

Every day in school, we ask our kids to say the Pledge of Allegiance. It ends with these words: _"With liberty and justice**for all.** "_ Lately, I've become kinda obsessed with those last two words. I think about them all the time -- _what does "for all" really mean? And why do we ask our kids to say it every day?_

[Well, we ask them to say it so they memorize it. We want them to memorize it so they'll internalize it -- and we want them to internalize it so that maybe they actually live it.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e363198/3404261584/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Well+we+ask+them+to+say+it+so+they+memor&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND")

* * *

Right now, we have a president who isn't exactly a "for all" guy. He's a "for some" guy, or a "for few" guy -- or, let's be honest, a "for me" guy.

**But Democrats -- well, Democrats are the "for all" party. And I can prove it to you. Here's how:**

In 2017, you helped start this incredible blue wave in Virginia. We elected a record number of Democrats to the state house. And then those Democrats got right to work to expand Medicaid -- and they succeeded, they passed it. And when Governor Northam signed that bill, we all celebrated, because 400,000 more Virginians now have access to health care.

But here's the thing -- maybe 50% of those 400,000 Virginians are Republicans. They didn't vote for the Democrats who expanded Medicaid. They may never vote for a Democrat in their entire life. _But that doesn't mean Democrats didn't fight tooth and nail to get them health care anyway._

[Because Democrats truly are, in 2018, the "for all" party.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e36319f/3404261584/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Because+Democrats+truly+are+in+2018+the+&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND")

We are "for all" and we will fight for all, because we're one of four states with the audacity to call ourselves a "Commonwealth" -- we fight for the common good, that's what we do. [And it's what we'll keep doing, if we keep electing Democrats.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e36319e/3404261584/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+And+its+what+well+keep+doing+if+we+keep+&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND")

**Are you in?** We can't do it without you. Every Democrat running in Virginia, _including me_ , needs your help to hit our goals. We can't reach every voter unless we have the resources to place ads on TV, run a strategic digital advertising program, and -- most critically -- hire enough organizing staff to talk to folks out in their communities all across the Commonwealth.

**Please, if you believe in a Virginia and an America for all, make an online contribution to Virginia Democrats today.**

**You can pitch in through this link - it only takes about two minutes:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e36319d/3404261584/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND")

Thank you very much. I'm so grateful to have you with me.

_Tim_
* * *

"I pledge allegiance to the Flag of the United States of America, and to the Republic for which it stands, one Nation under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all."
---
* * *
|
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e363191/3404261584/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e363190/3404261584/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11cf/3e0906/73f2db2f/3e363197/3404261584/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND&source=20180914_1_FR_TK_for-all-LDND") Thanks for having Tim's back!

Arlington, VA 22202

Bob Menendez is the "Senator of Sleaze" who "palled around with a wealthy, influential donor, accepting lavish trips, stays in luxury hotels, and vacations on private jets."

Enough is enough.
This November, it's time for change. It's time to elect Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin, a Senator we can be proud of.

subject: change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Washington can't seem to get anything done these days between the partisan bickering and the political brinksmanship.

name: Mel Hall
subject: If something is broken, you fix it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress |
body:
Friends,

When you see something broken, you fix it. I think we can all agree that Congress is about as broken as anything we’ve ever seen.

Growing up on my family’s farm, if we didn’t fix something, it didn’t magically fix itself -- you had to actually do the work. But when I look at Congress today, I don’t see productive work. It’s broken, and nobody’s fixing it.

That’s why I’ve released a new plan outlining a few common-sense ideas to help Congress get back on track.

There are 3 basic parts to the plan:

Congress actually has to work. They should work a 5 day workweek, hold regular town halls in their districts, and if they don’t do their jobs and can’t manage to pass a budget, they shouldn’t get paid.

Reduce the amount of money in politics. Money is corrupting the system, and it’s not the way our Founding Fathers wanted Congress to work. We should prohibit contributions from corporate PACs and lobbyists, prohibit taxpayer-funded mailings during election years, and ban lobbying by former members of Congress for 5 years.

Make both parties work together. We need new ideas and fresh leadership in Congress, so we need to set term limits on Committee Chairs and Ranking Members to stop any one person from blocking progress, require bipartisan cosponsors on all legislation, and guarantee that each bill gets real markup and consideration.

We can all sit around staring at each other, wondering when someone is going to come and solve our problems, or we can lace up our boots and get to work. It’s going to take all of us, working together, but Hoosiers are used to it, and I know we can get it done.

Thank you,

Mel Hall

DONATE
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180914-mh-fix-congress&refcode=em180914_fixcongress

-------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress |
-------------------------------------------

South Bend, IN 46624 United States

Peter -- The Republicans have launched a broadside attack against the provisions of the Affordable Care Act that guarantee coverage for pre-existing conditions.

This could be catastrophic and life-threatening for millions of Americans who rely on this insurance for access to medicine and treatment.

[**Dan is racing to stop this attack, but we need you to act fast: Click here to help Dan continue his work for bipartisan solutions to lower healthcare premiums and protect coverage for pre-existing conditions ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2wrOvuCXD_xrX9zZQaYfHI6IAEsnuCHsgmXBwrywYlI=/k_GgDcy-5mdumZw7JZQmkXPO3s_BlDub4RjOhaVT08g=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_NO_180914_1_3&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

**This lawsuit, brought by 20 GOP states, aims to strike down rules requiring insurers to cover those of us who need health care the most.**

To make matters worse, the Trump administration is refusing to defend the rules in court.

[DEFEND OUR HEALTH CARE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2wrOvuCXD_xrX9zZQaYfHI6IAEsnuCHsgmXBwrywYlI=/k_GgDcy-5mdumZw7JZQmkXPO3s_BlDub4RjOhaVT08g=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_NO_180914_1_3&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS WATCH #5
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr1OIgCKSuHSIJSNrx5sGDrlG5hVTXDI3nLMVQHu5rYrXg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=1)
| Peter, Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings to the Supreme Court are now complete. The Senate Judiciary Committee is expected to vote on Kavanaugh Thursday, September 20, 2018. The full Senate vote is expected the end of September. The hearings covered important subjects such as Roe vs. Wade, healthcare, gun rights, judicial independence, and presidential power. We’ve compiled 3 key takeaways from the hearings.
#### 1\. Kavanaugh’s introduction to the American people and the partisan response.
Kavanaugh gave an opening statement that allowed the American people to learn more about him and his perspective of the U.S. Supreme Court. We encourage you to [read Kavanaugh’s full opening remarks](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvOcjRx42BfS9Xim3NtciaCj45kJQoyKnWxkdnK7MOj8nX66k310wW_Jvb-AtYrQAf4SEn37ClFGzrDlpKDzXqRva_cO2aRA5cH2cbZDl3briV51xZnxxW8EY742sYHTcHXq4D-VIf16G89xjWbb38Xw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=2). “I am an optimist. I live on the sunrise side of the mountain, not the sunset side of the mountain. I see the day that is coming, not the day that is gone. I am optimistic about the future of America and the future of our independent Judiciary. I revere the Constitution. If confirmed to the Supreme Court, I will keep an open mind in every case. I will do equal right to the poor and to the rich. I will always strive to preserve the Constitution of the United States and the American Rule of Law.” _— Judge Brett Kavanaugh, Opening Remarks_ For the first hour and a half of the hearing, Democrats pushed to adjourn, arguing a lack of time to review Kavanaugh’s documents and requesting additional documents. Republicans countered—more than 350,000 pages were made available to the public, which is more than the past five Supreme Court nominees combined. Protestors continually interrupted the hearing. In the first day alone, more than 70 protesters were arrested with over 200 total arrested by the end of the week.
#### 2\. _Roe v. Wade_ remained in the background of the entire hearing.
Judge Kavanaugh was repeatedly asked about his view of _Roe v. Wade_. The issue of abortion was perhaps the most central theme of the hearing. Not because of the questions from the Judicial Committee (although many asked questions regarding _Roe v. Wade_), but because of the activist groups such as the Women’s March Organization who planted protesters inside the hearing room and in the halls of the Capitol. Throughout the hearing, Kavanaugh was careful never to give his personal opinion on an issue, as that is not the role of a Judge or a Supreme Court Justice. Instead, he drew from the Constitution and brought to light Supreme Court precedent. Kavanaugh’s previous decision in the case _Rochelle Garza v. Eric D. Hargan_ is just one of the reasons pro-abortion advocates protest his confirmation to the Supreme Court and Pro-life advocates believe he will be a defender of the sanctity of life.
#### 3\. Kavanaugh’s record on religious liberty should encourage people of faith.
Senator Ted Cruz during the hearing highlighted key decisions Kavanaugh has made on the bench that are of great interest to the faith community. In 2015 Kavanaugh wrote a dissenting opinion siding with the Priests for Life who were required by the _Affordable Care Act_ to pay for contraceptive coverage despite their religious convictions. Kavanaugh stated, “the government had ways to ensure contraceptive coverage without doing so on the backs of religious objectors.” In another important religious liberty case, Kavanaugh argued high school students should be permitted to pray at football games. In the hearings, he said, “Religious people, speakers, and speech are entitled to equal treatment.” **The hearings are complete. The Senate vote is approaching.** Franklin Graham from Samaritan’s Purse tweeted, “I’ve been impressed with Judge Kavanaugh’s steady temperament and his solid responses. His vast knowledge of case law and the U.S. Constitution is evident. **_We need to continue to pray for him and his family during this time and for the outcome of this process. I also urge you to contact the Senators in your state to ask them to confirm him_** [emphasis added].” We may not have a direct vote in these confirmation hearings but we can pray and we can vote Tuesday, November 6, 2018, to ensure our values are accurately represented in Congress—so our constitutional rights will be protected on the bench. **Will you join with me in praying for:**
* Endurance and peace for Brett Kavanaugh and his family.
* Wisdom for our Senators to be true to the Constitution rather than political parties.

**United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=3) P.S. If you haven’t contacted your Senators yet - it’s not too late! Contact them today with our [easy-to-use tool.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kErcChkhgXyK6emZY6HIjgzUnisRN3F66ADVWMUwgbE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=4) You can check out previous editions of SCOTUS Watch at: [https://myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch](https:/www.myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch).
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R5LqpO-pYuvVIOOj4RsxM_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=6) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180914com01&n=10)

Will you join with me in praying for: Endurance and peace for Brett Kavanaugh and his family. Wisdom for our Senators to be true to the Constitution rather than political parties. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO P.S. If you haven’t contacted your Senators yet - it’s not too late! Contact them today with our You can check out previous editions of SCOTUS Watch at: https:/www.myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch. My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics. ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Heidi Heitkamp
subject: Exciting news (it's a match!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, I'm really worried: **A Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC is spending $2.3 million to DEFEAT me in North Dakota and strengthen the GOP's grip on the Senate. **

And it gets worse: Twenty OTHER right-wing groups have already flooded North Dakota with attack ads. Then a RealClearPolitics polling analysis showed me losing by less than two points to my opponent.

**That's why this news couldn't have come at a better time: A group of donors just offered to MATCH every gift, dollar for dollar, up to our $75,000 match goal.[Donate $5 or more (becomes $10) to protect North Dakota's Democratic Senate seat.](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e561c/688a0c21/560ea589/73af2ccd/659531922/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGhoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTU0LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4hh?refcode=jtk1954-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: betofortexas.com
subject: The deck was always stacked against us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

According to new reporting from Politico, Ted Cruz and his team are
courting mega-donors, special-interest groups and even President Donald
Trump to help his campaign in the final months before Election Day.

We counted it up, and not only are we up against Cruz, his PAC and his
super PAC: we’re up against ten outside groups that could spend millions
in Texas to try to tip the scales in Cruz’s favor.

But we don’t need
mega-donors or super PACs in our corner. YOU are our secret weapon. YOU
are the reason we’re able to keep running our campaign the right way:
powered by people, not PACs.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180914&t=1019&akid=9891%2E444211%2EZsdQvM ]Every grassroots donation you give sends a powerful message to Cruz
and each of the ten groups in his corner: we’re powered by people, and
we’re not backing down. Can you give
a contribution of
$3
to Beto’s campaign today to make sure we reach our end-of-quarter
fundraising goal this month?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180914&t=1020&akid=9891%2E444211%2EZsdQvM ]Contribute
$3
»

When Beto kicked off his campaign for Senate, we knew it wouldn’t be a
fair fight. We knew that Cruz would tap into the network of donors he
built during his failed bid for president in 2016. And we knew Cruz would
rely on PACs, super PACs and mega-donors to prop up his campaign when the
times got tough.

And yet, Beto still made the choice to reject PACs and the
special-interest groups. He never wanted you to have to doubt for one
second who he answers to.

Beto is running a winning campaign by getting back to the basics: he’s
visited with Texans in each of our state’s 254 counties to learn more
about the issues that matter to their communities. And by relying on
grassroots donations alone, we’ve out-raised Senator Cruz time and time
again.

Together, we’ve proved the pundits on both sides of the aisle wrong: the
most recent poll shows Beto’s down by just one point.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180914&t=1021&akid=9891%2E444211%2EZsdQvM ]We can win this -- but only if we work our hearts out for these final
few weeks of the campaign. Help our campaign give Cruz and his
special-interest backers a run for their money. Rush
a grassroots donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign right now.

They might try to out-spend us, but they’ll never out-work us. Thank you.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7221?refcode=em20180914&t=1022&akid=9891%2E444211%2EZsdQvM ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180914footer&t=1023&akid=9891%2E444211%2EZsdQvM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=9891%2E444211%2EZsdQvM

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Josh Hawley
subject: BREAKING: Schumer's plan to impeach Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
This past weekend, Chuck Schumer was asked: "When are you all going to impeach Trump?" The far left has officially gone off the deep end.

This past weekend, Chuck Schumer was asked: _**“When are you all going to impeach Trump?”**_

Schumer's response? _**“The sooner, the better.”**_

It’s shocking enough that a party leader would endorse such a pathetic political tactic when he knows there are no grounds for doing so. What’s more surprising, though, is that my opponent, Senator Claire McCaskill, still supports Schumer.
This is one of the top races in the country, one that could decide the fate of the Senate majority, and [I could really use your support.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=21906effbf2e4cb0b8ac7d7cb5b02766&_e=EViYelNkYehUfJUjBsl8vdiQgMsoE4Sda7rquUTnAJ6sGwaqUNUlU3dotX_FnFSEb1C_jy0QiUT6-HSn9ZQLRk_N659iulOvKHoeGEL7yB259mP34RoIsTX6moQ45ZHSBUMF6A6LwEz8wUnyk9OayPwO56oj9SSLU43p_QJsiXzWmobArqr6l_mx_c71cGScskfNz6zxjIZ3a_F9FuMS719ZvB0Gli0MkMu7EDzXuYnVbfiXrlQPKjzz3AOy3F3XRhz1VDLtyC0gl4f-Zdbla8iWcYcqkK458d6IknFLbipqC5kWFcjeILtk4--OxHL9JEYDqtRxpXpL5wg_w-nsc_6Ldt2ywrTi10-gpn4caFy2Fw5ZLXUJzoZVoylR4dIA) [ STAND AGAINST THE LEFT - DONATE TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=21906effbf2e4cb0b8ac7d7cb5b02766&_e=EViYelNkYehUfJUjBsl8vdiQgMsoE4Sda7rquUTnAJ6sGwaqUNUlU3dotX_FnFSEb1C_jy0QiUT6-HSn9ZQLRk_N659iulOvKHoeGEL7yB259mP34RoIsTX6moQ45ZHSBUMF6A6LwEz8wUnyk9OayPwO56oj9SSLU43p_QJsiXw1-uEExl14Jrydc8R8FGEhMCJ_HtzsR7AuA8UxK7_5OJoCdXeeVeC6zRnY7Rwu1wAEAQCqidiDJez12SbuYWbhs10086AyM_d1EBcI4C3UCTvdUAVUoeMg1JzW-s2Jekk3RQzbDlI5vLO9MK6zCQjnmr6OMFEgmK0RBS9Vik-4sjGjy58CB9V2XDbJRVR-cnA2lJqvklhhjuXA3s2y_Ss0) My opponent has chosen liberal party leaders over her own state _**time and again**_. It’s why she voted against the 2017 tax cuts, it’s why she has obstructed Supreme Court nominees, and it’s why she is willing to support such an extremist liberal like Schumer. It’s irresponsible, partisan, and it’s unfair to those who have trusted her to represent them in Washington.

This is yet another example of why we cannot allow Democrats to take back the Senate. If they win back the majority, nothing will stop Schumer from making his radical liberal policies the law of the land.

If we’re going to stop that, we need to defeat Senators who will put liberal special interests above their own voters. That's why I’m running for Senate — because no American should ever have to question the loyalties of their Senator.

If you want to make that happen, I need your help. McCaskill hasn’t just supported Schumer, he’s also fundraised for her. [Your donation to Team Hawley can help me keep up with her deep pocket donors and close that gap.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=21906effbf2e4cb0b8ac7d7cb5b02766&_e=EViYelNkYehUfJUjBsl8vdiQgMsoE4Sda7rquUTnAJ6sGwaqUNUlU3dotX_FnFSEb1C_jy0QiUT6-HSn9ZQLRk_N659iulOvKHoeGEL7yB259mP34RoIsTX6moQ45ZHSBUMF6A6LwEz8wUnyk9OayPwO56oj9SSLU43p_QJsiXx1WLc0cUPPcwI_W4lh38ShXLY-G5tZKUA7xHUsbwJhX8tECIXjqj0118scdcaoHgScxImmj-WOlmvfGyFCz-Q1mN0R58M1mDzcTXLJmD6fM8MhrLp911zuPF8_4tuMRHT8z3niIY3KvKy7-0HxzmIYO5EJyek9nr4J1XokyhOMNNT9olOD6MU9GyJJLnEnAPTz4aaBJMfzCYhpuwbzqCsm) Sincerely,
Josh Hawley

What is a Town Hall anyway? Here's how I define it:
- Free and open to the public
- At a convenient time for working people
- Publicized in advance
- Taking un-screened questions and answering them so all can hear

This really isn't too much to ask. But apparently it's more than Martha Roby can handle. She hasn't had an event that met this criteria since 2013. That means it's been over 1800 days since she's faced the public in a meaningful way.

But not Tabitha. Tabitha has already done one such event and she's got 4 more already scheduled (already listed on the website and Facebook) between now and November 6th.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/MGM%20volunteers%20meeting.png]

We hope you attend these public events, but even more, we hope that those in the community who feel un-heard, un-valued, or un-represented will know about these events and will come to share their experiences and concerns, knowing that Tabitha is truly listening.

Donate $10 now to support Tabitha's Town Halls! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2?emci=4a98906f-30b8-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6&emdi=3d86ed81-48b8-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6&ceid=6898985&contactdata=n80Y0tFJPVAdkO2uxWPOJmGqwvfhhZple%2FjvdlKQY2ZtOO3gyGJ5ZVzcxmUWEACU]

Transparency is easy when you have nothing to hide. Listening is easy when you really want to hear. Accountability is easy when you are a true public servant.

Give Alabamians the representation they deserve.

Donate Now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2?emci=4a98906f-30b8-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6&emdi=3d86ed81-48b8-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6&ceid=6898985&am=&contactdata=n80Y0tFJPVAdkO2uxWPOJmGqwvfhhZple%2FjvdlKQY2ZtOO3gyGJ5ZVzcxmUWEACU]

name: Mandi Karp, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: Here's where we stand:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
---

Hi there,

Before I ask you to **[chip in to the campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/dF6jOSBmANzQbwr000pLDZhDcbHEaJqOysMRX5htVW4=/b3KcyxRZTTIxXBkoH6EJ24ydEHY3YnGkuAduQ5yPP_E=?gpsid=37_57_3587&refcode=em18_180914_09mm2_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_09mm2_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)** , I wanted to talk about where we stand.

This race comes down to a stark choice between Steve Sisolak, a proven public servant with a plan to keep Nevada moving forward, and Adam Laxalt, a shameless lackey for powerful special interests and Washington Republicans like Donald Trump.

Nevada's voters know it. A poll in July showed that the race was tied, but Steve has the momentum and pulled ahead -- and he's now leading Laxalt by two points!

We've got big plans to keep up this momentum, but we need your help. We just launched another TV ad about Steve's commitment to public schools. And we need to raise the funds to keep it on the air.

**[There are still thousands of undecided voters, so we're not slowing down. Please contribute $5 or more right now to keep us on track this month and help us tell more voters about Steve's plan to build a brighter future for Nevada.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dF6jOSBmANzQbwr000pLDZhDcbHEaJqOysMRX5htVW4=/b3KcyxRZTTIxXBkoH6EJ24ydEHY3YnGkuAduQ5yPP_E=?gpsid=37_57_3587&refcode=em18_180914_09mm2_L2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_09mm2_L2_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, September 15. Hitting our goal is more important than ever -- because Election Day is rapidly approaching.

**[Can Steve count on you?](https://act.myngp.com/el/dF6jOSBmANzQbwr000pLDZhDcbHEaJqOysMRX5htVW4=/b3KcyxRZTTIxXBkoH6EJ24ydEHY3YnGkuAduQ5yPP_E=?gpsid=37_57_3587&refcode=em18_180914_09mm2_L3_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_09mm2_L3_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Make your voice heard in the Senate for Kavanaugh!
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ | | | | [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjU3LTNlMzA1NWY1M2I0NzQwYjBiMzAwMmZiNGUzZmYzMjM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbnNmb3Jwcm9zcGVyaXR5Lm9yZy9zZW5hdGUtb3Blbi1sZXR0ZXIvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zY290dXNfb3Blbl9sZXR0ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUdPUDMwOTE0MThB&K=ZurKiilqtd_5Es3yI_G0tQ)

Fellow American,

Last week, the Senate concluded a week of confirmation hearings to determine the fate of Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination as an Associate Justice to the Supreme Court of the United States of America.

But special interest groups have been working to block his confirmation. In fact, their obstructionist efforts started before President Trump’s nominee was even announced!

The fact is that the confirmation hearings represented only the beginning of the decision process for the many “swing votes” up for grabs across both the Republican and Democratic members of the Senate. A story posted on Politico just confirmed that the first committee vote is scheduled to be made on September 20, and it is expected to be made along party lines.

We __MUST__ fight back while there’s still time to win this battle.

But here is the thing: **The Senate only takes action when compelled by the overwhelming voice of their constituency.**

That is why, in addition to knocking on over 100,000 doors, making over 350,000 phone calls, and meeting individually with key Senators, Americans for Prosperity is working to get over 1 million signatures on an Open Letter urging the swift confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh.

When we can show Senators on both sides of the aisle that hundreds of thousands of their own constituents want them to confirm a pro-Constitution nominee, it is impossible for them not to take action.

**[Today, I’d like to ask you to make your voice heard; please sign this Open Letter to the Senate today.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjU3LTNlMzA1NWY1M2I0NzQwYjBiMzAwMmZiNGUzZmYzMjM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbnNmb3Jwcm9zcGVyaXR5Lm9yZy9zZW5hdGUtb3Blbi1sZXR0ZXIvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zY290dXNfb3Blbl9sZXR0ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUdPUDMwOTE0MThB&K=24obkmC3_YdKAiDEzHpNRQ)**

[Sign the open letter today >>](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjU3LTNlMzA1NWY1M2I0NzQwYjBiMzAwMmZiNGUzZmYzMjM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbnNmb3Jwcm9zcGVyaXR5Lm9yZy9zZW5hdGUtb3Blbi1sZXR0ZXIvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zY290dXNfb3Blbl9sZXR0ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUdPUDMwOTE0MThB&K=6k5icXCTkC2VycL6zCtwZA)

Thank You
\- Tim

Tim Phillips
President
Americans for Prosperity

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: we can't wait (climate change)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
This month marks two years since the U.S. officially joined the international climate agreement. Climate change is one of the most pressing concerns for our country, and the international agreement made under President Obama was a tremendous step toward solving the problem.
That's why it's unacceptable that this Administration has decided to back out of it. **We are now the only country in the world that 's not participating in this historic agreement.**
I have pushed the Administration to rejoin the agreement, but if we're going to combat climate change, we can't wait.
That's why I was so inspired by all the universities, cities, states, and businesses who came together after the Administration's climate announcement to say, _" If the President doesn't do it, we will! We will take on climate change!"_
**Congress too has a responsibility to join them in combating climate change. [If you agree that climate change is real and must be addressed, will you sign my petition urging Congress to act on climate change? ](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=G9nx2gl5eXNdGkyOPre4olwtqvNBNySo)**
Thank you,
Amy

[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=r0SH%2FsrD3zGYZ77ublGFBlwtqvNBNySo)

| | **We've got three pieces of bad news Peter.** **1) We have the closest poll yet -- with Sherrod at 46% and Renacci at 42%.** _**2) We are in danger of having to take down our TV ads.**_ **3)[The digital team is _NOT ON TRACK_ to hit its FEC fundraising goal.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb2/4462dc26/65a5a50f/200436c8/3919421485/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180914?refcode=sbe180914_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fffb2/4462dc26/65a5a50f/200436c8/3919421485/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTE0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180914?refcode=sbe180914_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: we can't afford Wendy Rogers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
In November, voters in AZ-01 have a choice. And recent article in Tucson Local Media really made the choice in this race clear.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f50/1a8421e1/1a58b7f0f/491d00f7/2548445317/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, In November, voters in AZ-01 have a choice. **And a recent article in _Tucson Local Media_ really made the choice in this race clear.** The Republican trying to unseat Tom, Wendy Rogers, is as far-right as they come. In the article, Rogers pledged to be a rubber-stamp for the White House -- _while Tom emphasized that he is focused on improving our communities ' economy and expanding access to rural health care._ Team, Arizona families can't afford to have Wendy Rogers representing them in Congress (literally, we can't afford it -- remember, she said Social Security, an earned benefits program that is critical to our seniors, is _unconstitutional_!). "" Team, In November, voters in AZ-01 have a choice. And a recent article in Tucson Local Media really made the choice in this race clear. The Republican trying to unseat Tom, Wendy Rogers, is as far-right as they come. In the article, Rogers pledged to be a rubber-stamp for the White House -- while Tom emphasized that he is focused on improving our communities ' economy and expanding access to rural health care. Team, Arizona families can't afford to have Wendy Rogers representing them in Congress (literally, we can't afford it -- remember, she said Social Security, an earned benefits program that is critical to our seniors, is unconstitutional!). name: Bob Casey
subject: why I'm asking again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62bd/51dbcc2a/1ddeccd9/3a8e4a9/1723891807/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team,

I know it seems like every day a member of my campaign team sends you an email asking you to make a donation. This is one of those emails, but before I ask for your donation, I'm going to explain why.

We need to do this because even though I will keep fighting every day until Election Day, campaigns still take a lot of resources. My team sets fundraising goals each month because we never know what's coming next. We've woken up to discover that the NRA, the Koch brothers and the RNC decided to come after me for standing up to the President's dangerous and divisive agenda -- who knows who will target me next.

When these attacks come down the line, it takes a lot of work to fight back, which is why we can't afford to miss another goal. We fell short in August and are trying to make up the difference this month. Right now I'm trying to raise another $32,000 by midnight tomorrow so that we can keep ads on the air, lights on at campaign headquarters and be ready for the GOP's next attack.

I'm going to keep fighting with two fists up against GOP efforts to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and change Medicare and Social Security as we know it, but I need your help to make sure we have the tools to keep going. **Can you join me today by chipping in $5 or whatever you can to help meet my fundraising goal?**

Here's the best link: [**_secure.bobcasey.com/donate_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180914_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Thanks,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180914_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A note from the Global Climate Summit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I'm on the front lines taking action to fight climate change. Are you with me?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc78/2f5ea88d/75a60482/2cbc4430/3211149524/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Today, climate leaders from across the world are gathered together in San Francisco at the Global Climate Summit. The atmosphere is serious: Climate change remains perhaps the biggest challenge for our collective futures, and we are all doing our part to fight back. **We're all working together to fight climate change -- with one big exception: the Trump administration.** Trump and his band of climate deniers are not only refusing to acknowledge the problem, they're actively making it worse. By reducing emissions standards, repealing the Clean Power Plan, and making it easier for energy companies to release methane into the atmosphere, they're actively filling our atmosphere with powerful greenhouse gases. That's a huge problem for all of us in America, who will suffer from more health problems like asthma, and a huge problem for our global community as our emissions accelerate climate change. [**So that's why I'm taking action, and I need you to as well. Before our big end-of-summer mid-month deadline, will you chip in to power our climate movement and help us fight back against climate change?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc78/2f5ea88d/75a60482/2cbc4430/3211149524/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Look, I want you to know this, without question: We're not going to back down here in Washington state. All of us who have been affected by climate change already -- whether wildfires or floods, air pollution or rising temperatures -- know how seriously we must take this threat. And I promise you that I'll be on the front lines, stepping up our actions to meet our climate goals. [**Will you be with me?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc78/2f5ea88d/75a60482/2cbc4430/3211149524/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Even as the Trump administration shirks its climate responsibilities, we Americans -- and our global community -- are still firmly in the Paris Agreement. We must take action now to help solve the greatest global crisis of our generation. [**Before our mid-month deadline on September 15, help us fill the vacuum of climate leadership left behind by the Trump administration. Chip in today, and let's fight back.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc78/2f5ea88d/75a60482/2cbc4430/3211149524/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc78/2f5ea88d/75a60482/2cbc4430/3211149524/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-09-14_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc78/2f5ea88d/75a60482/2cbc4437/3211149524/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Help me call Steve King out to debate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**It’s been one week since I issued a debate challenge to Steve King.** He responded by saying he wouldn’t debate me because, as he put it, “there’s not a clear division on issues.” If Steve King truly thinks there isn’t a clear division on where he and I stand on the issues, he’s even more out of touch than we thought. Here’s just a few of the places where we differ:
* Steve King calls the recently passed tax bill his “best vote.” I think it was a scam perpetuated on the working class. It’s going to add $1.9 trillion to our deficit and nearly all of the tax cuts go to those at the top. I stand for tax reform that benefits the working class.
* Rep. King has voted to take away health care from thousands of Iowans with pre-existing conditions. I want to ensure access to affordable health care for all Iowans.
* Farm incomes are collapsing to 2002 levels and Steve King has done nothing about it. I’ll actually challenge the corporate consolidation of our markets that is squeezing our farmers, and I oppose the disastrous trade wars that Iowa is bearing the brunt of.
* Steve King doesn’t show up. He’s missed 39% of House Agriculture Committee hearings and 80% of Small Business Committee hearings. He doesn’t do Town Halls or events with the general public and now, he won’t even participate in a debate! I’ve done two 39 county tours in the last year and am launching a third 39 county Town Hall tour in the next few days. (You can’t fake showing up.)
* Steve King practices politics of division and fear. **I want to work for ALL of the people here to build our district’s future together.**

There are significant differences on the issues between myself and Steve King, and the voters deserve to hear loud and clear the differences between the incumbent and the candidate running to replace them. Please sign this petition today, asking that Steve King do his democratic duty and participate in three debates. Our goal is to collect as many signatures as possible to pressure him into doing what is right and honor the great American tradition of political debates. **Our voters deserve nothing less.**
[****You can access the petition demanding a** debate HERE.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2195576/11365436/-1480649960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTBjNjE4NC02OGI4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h24DFTvprwsbFQBRMvddMaYMoPRe4Oqm_pZsHH3sIMw=)
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2195577/11365437/-761428161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTBjNjE4NC02OGI4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h24DFTvprwsbFQBRMvddMaYMoPRe4Oqm_pZsHH3sIMw=)

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Peter, help me fight for this coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
I can’t imagine a bigger threat to the health care of those
with pre-existing conditions than this,
Peter.

We’re working hard to combat rising costs by reaching across
the aisle, but if the Republicans continue with this line of
attack, an estimated 50 million Americans could lose access to
their health care.

I’m calling on every one of my supporters to step up and
support our efforts to fix our system, not sabotage it beyond
repair.

Please use this link to contribute what you can towards a
solution: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defend-healthcare

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: My grandmother's voice:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3704/9e00690/5aa4a99d/24014902/2684103681/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&source=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx")
Friends,

Growing up, my grandmother always told me to go to school, mind my teachers, get my lessons, and bring that education home -- for my little brother, my baby sister, and the kids in my neighborhood.

My grandmother knew then what I know now: if we want to get anywhere in life, we need to get there together. I truly believe that this can be our story again, Florida -- that's why I decided to run for Governor -- but I need your help to make it happen.

**[Our campaign just released a new TV ad letting everyone know what's possible if we show up for each other this November. Watch it now and then chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us spread our story to every corner of the state.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3704/9e00690/5aa4a99d/24014905/2684103681/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Our+campaign+just+released+a+new+TV+ad+l")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3704/9e00690/5aa4a99d/24014904/2684103681/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=3")
[WATCH THE VIDEO](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3704/9e00690/5aa4a99d/24014907/2684103681/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+WATCH+THE+VIDEO")

For anyone who's ever been told they don't belong.

For anyone who's ever been told they couldn't accomplish something because of where they came from.

For anyone who's ever been told they couldn't make a difference.

I stand with you and so do thousands of Floridians who have joined this campaign.

Together, we can bring it home for affordable healthcare, we can bring it home for better jobs and better wages, and we can bring it home for the public education our children deserve.

**[Chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help spread our story so we can bring it home on Tuesday, November 6 and win this election together.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3704/9e00690/5aa4a99d/24014906/2684103681/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+5+or+whatever+you+can+afford+to+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3704/9e00690/5aa4a99d/24014919/2684103681/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180914_NewAD_fnd_gq_act__nono_Gma_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=6+-+DONATE")

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Friends, Growing up, my grandmother always told me to go to school, mind my teachers, get my lessons, and bring that education home -- for my little brother, my baby sister, and the kids in my neighborhood. My grandmother knew then what I know now: if we want to get anywhere in life, we need to get there together. I truly believe that this can be our story again, Florida -- that's why I decided to run for Governor -- but I need your help to make it happen. "" "" "" For anyone who's ever been told they don't belong. For anyone who's ever been told they couldn't accomplish something because of where they came from. For anyone who's ever been told they couldn't make a difference. I stand with you and so do thousands of Floridians who have joined this campaign. Together, we can bring it home for affordable healthcare, we can bring it home for better jobs and better wages, and we can bring it home for the public education our children deserve. "+" Bring it home, Andrew Gillum "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: You proved this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|

| | | I want to take a quick moment to thank you.

This week, we not only launched our newest television ad, but we also organized support for another Democrat running for Senate this year. It's going to be a team effort to win back the Senate in November -- _and you proved you 're up for the challenge._

Thanks to our grassroots supporters, we replenished our Media Fund and have the resources to keep pushing our Democratic movement forward. We couldn't have done it without you -- **thank you.**

_We 're less than eight weeks out from Election Day._ My team and I will continue to keep you updated about the changing state of our race and how you can help us defend my Senate seat in a critical year for Democrats.

Thanks again for all you do,

Martin

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: a new poll of our race is out -- and it’s close!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
VA-7 may be a historically Republican district, but this seat is now a Toss Up, and we must continue our work on the ground to win on Election Day.
| | Peter, a recent poll of VA-7 from _The New York Times_ shows that our race is now within the margin of error, with 9 percent of voters still undecided. This result echoes what various election analysts, and our interactions with voters on the ground, have indicated for months now: **VA-7 may be a historically Republican district, but this seat is now a Toss Up, and we must continue our work on the ground to win on Election Day.** Voters are receptive to our message of positive change, and they are tired of the hyper-partisan politics that currently define Washington. Efforts from grassroots supporters like you have made this a toss-up race! Now, we must work together to close this gap and win. There are 53 days left until the election, **[and I would appreciate your support today, if you can make a donation of any size.](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/NKIOPJ7nMGa4UiBpBfr3SUFdLwk-sJqbenQd2_NJzas=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.14_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **We will win this race together. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Dana Bye Sent: Thu, Sep 13, 5:53 PM Subject: a new poll of our race is out -- and it's close! Friends, some important news about our race came out this week. _The New York Times_ polled voters in VA-7, and the final results came in late last night: In their poll, **Abigail is running _just four points_ behind Rep. Dave Brat,** 43 percent to his 47 percent.** ** This result is within the margin of error, and 9 percent of voters are undecided. **This race is truly a Toss Up!!** [**Will you make a donation of any size to our campaign today, so that we can continue to earn the support of voters in the 7th district and close this polling gap?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/NKIOPJ7nMGa4UiBpBfr3SUFdLwk-sJqbenQd2_NJzas=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.14_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Friends, we are excited about these results. Rep. Brat won VA-7 with 58 percent of the vote just two years ago! Our grassroots campaign has pushed this race to within the margin of error. **This poll tells us that we can win this district, but we need to keep up the pace towards November!** Many voters interviewed for this poll said they are not yet familiar with Abigail -- so we have room to grow our support, if we can share her compelling story with them. Closing this gap will take a tremendous amount of work, to be sure -- we must knock thousands more doors, make thousands more phone calls, and make our case to voters through our advertisements on television and elsewhere. **But I am confident that we can and will succeed, with this community of grassroots supporters behind us.** [**Please, consider making a donation to Team Spanberger today to help us close this gap.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/NKIOPJ7nMGa4UiBpBfr3SUFdLwk-sJqbenQd2_NJzas=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.14_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/NKIOPJ7nMGa4UiBpBfr3SUFdLwk-sJqbenQd2_NJzas=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.14_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/NKIOPJ7nMGa4UiBpBfr3SUFdLwk-sJqbenQd2_NJzas=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/ITerRg9RDxBymWtqJHcLOHB6vV7HRijZDjdmGod-mzc=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6-UccLHzkScSTAR-biCS2_EP5J4A5kBMIMIk0Sk-_0=/22R19zdmAtDz3JUM--IwqOhnbNCGKj9iuuj2KN4E0cE=).

body:

Friend,

We've got one mission in between now and November: to elect a new senator who can truly represent the Wisconsin Way!

And the reason why has never been more clear. Tammy Baldwin has extreme views that do NOT represent Wisconsin.

She voted against Judge Gorsuch and wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before announcing she’d vote no on his appointment.

She votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts for the middle class.

She campaigns for a complete socialized, government takeover of health care.

And let's not forget how she did NOTHING when she learned that a doctor was over prescribing addictive opioids to veterans at the Tomah VA.

I could go on and on. And I don't need to tell you, none of that is the Wisconsin Way.

[BRING THE WISCONSIN WAY TO WASHINGTON](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNLwYPCTI1bey8rtxNAp7FU3N-2opPacKg0qQghEfFxS9tKYur3SESDAF2htItuSa2Q-g4YI9UvxRCXx4QVDGv4I7_jVTrFbGxHw1W4EcnNJRHAU_Z0kSSqQRmhrYaCCGgKuj8unoF6qkjRCB1Gy-EDJTbBa_C3sHoT369fcGRHt1Wad1si76Xb3OHO6srZrB8y37AKeHXN5BIqmtROzcH722XZzLE83nybQhp6L3xADf5jpeCmndCPYk-rGMAiPvN9y8jqZUlaF2wqfszPzNWOLLh0U7uxCU1Hfj1Un_0ETqWgLTr_xOCdyixRCpoMHbL7UyejgKm0-G-Hv2LhZZt5MVjILPsNY0UIQ_FnGGEGOYF_fj7iY5p4nMQHS1pEqDpBVl0YSkx89m5gbirhZ6EmU%3D)
---

Let's just face it, Tammy Baldwin has let down the people she was elected to represent.

Come November, we've got a chance to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector she doesn’t even know exists!

We need a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working people who make our state, and our country what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way.

It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process.

I will be that voice. I’m a mom with a cause, who is here because of circumstance – not ambition. While Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it.

But it’s going to take all of us – united – to defeat Tammy.

[**I hope you'll join me today by chipping in today to bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNLwYPCTI1bey8rtxNAp7FU3N-2opPacKg0qQghEfFxS9tKYur3SESDAF2htItuSa2Q-g4YI9UvxRCXx4QVDGv4I7_jVTrFbGxHw1W4EcnNJRHAU_Z0kSSqQRmhrYaCCGgKuj8unoF6qkjRCB1Gy-EDJTbBa_C3sHoT369fcGRHt1_F6HFcJb_iZSCTdEchp4ccKGN6IyQfJCpwY1uFaVHICr3npa0cG4qH7Rbj82T0qi3A3c6DLjQMkHh0QPmePSapEReoLSmt2yKFgFFknp87cPqfjTiaiBEnbmzjw4ljEYU2XYHtecle2t_lwSXuZbWjZ_ahY50IeAvUjxZjiwLNaA-TlL6P2xKvUxhzpxZF-PAb3PMS4NDka4DiJMMxtdwQ5AnxSSg_0wLv13xkDOTiU%3D)

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNHFAr95w0Ccn0oNtUDo50VpdfTxyWGsV7WWnFxuBL5HgPGmVczV-IVpEVsN34qxhxIqRkQyopmgkMxSUEhVEBmXzFFb6NwSLbVNxUaVqA-_W8UiX2-TZ6QL_TwN9d7954v5etWzJtpO_dyUl59qHyijvwUwsUD00Fu06-vavWht-WPeKSWBjgjcw3YS87bcSZ83CIwJaF2fJgqO-kZzGIre2V1Tt0ep9LGpI-UiwX9cx5zc4h6c9-hh_q12yksjpAmoJFEkuw_9toA9ZHm_LPuEk7EmesgEBu0osCD-0zE-eTLP7oPHcBARr1Sbfa1mEjjakDCTfZTMcsHIqtoxbtDDpQnSDjZJBl4CN3Y2AJslh) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNHFAr95w0Ccn0oNtUDo50Vrdri-P-SlxdLH9NZ1o71_EDbaCTWl7KncsX3FuUNx0lKRUzocdqeZxMzDPxmg0pnERuWkdxKYqoWBPVucC4tq-f57GzZ_9WKbd8J7sIVBan2ZqIx_OpEZSsDVza1q7C4pGWHE7jK0uOQu-Lrc1IoDMj-Ba6TdhEmj0h9vy1XYyNJLY7lB7RmaQ3w6w0SuOU7FixDqkNKZGJ8FBYCRq1H0iWYEzE1fUAT5H89xxRYzYTrUQLXsScjLZQ7krUvYaUXNR8yB67ElgGjQO12e5WVQnrA1Q85DfvKELppEH7-0wFXS_Rz2n-WFT7wVaqHREd3q69T3D5TpBCoE-lWV8d6rv) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNM87o9rjb5-U_yQHMR-OEA-ywtgTX2g5MHNQGOdHrJG-lf01MtCT7xN3FgJzSSKD0IuV9HE6CJht4iU_d8LMnAk4wrUVZeCrj0l7CK1myEHy3tdZ5gVX5JA9b7MV2Vlg5G2WS-8QAJxBm4OBw68FeVrVTZVvns04F3LG7vHSGqpoK_ehJo4YMZyBGRgvcZF3fid5yxTygs9rVyxgpwhpY-WnbjnGZ8ODB1qvvydYa-RhoY3Acmmu2Lcf4OK-wZuY9g%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNDuaJ5b_v2UJO24K6HaTL1FKJ0DX3D4v4nzGhxIZ6onnaxN1_Pd7vPCEsWzG3v5IAwxOyiwuWzPgEoXrxh4_So8P2WOHuQCh43hlH8csc1xsXhb3rmOKJ_IPWvbGPGl85jQlHI-x-7MpWmBcTvsQ-Y-AjQUfA7YXp1Oyw75B_aiDTu8vSXYOZ7REC4rOS1F8IEvDcJ-EC7dvd7GMDLLYC_Iw4SVEY5teQj6m8x81enfPhb2mV8HMrvsqjyoArbIufQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNJxnT9uhy8ZhBU2OwFM__OpZHq9fou_y6Qe0piIKwv_EVi7MtHjkfLRigUxXgn5bp1nINUXRWVAC1zW4ylVTXMvPIhcN3RBYBIDmosOhrx1DrcCHgWFGH5mjgdmL5jax30F7AtatchlaP5dA0XJpiHVTy0O2cn0Yqj5jFh1qE52Nzg7pOl0Tdc8RjMu6Bzwg3NKFk0M7jeKF8aYu2csdWq6SHzbQ2L-2sLHGHaeduYruR_NNowl3ktXE1Ipo5uoogQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=nuRMgGI35-BYevvgL23QNHFAr95w0Ccn0oNtUDo50VpJZqhCldt8Z3Fwc_gYomCaJYD7HE4tEj352HiMGRq9yRZ2QZpDl3699r0SEu9xZ6bqPYBtXQBklc0U2P5JzuRIWxSa6dycbe2H5ousV57x0nagkBO-Nxr30EB1EquXmqtUjDmxVqzJVd13fp9FwfUxGgHcIzXA5oXWq26SjwceXHfDPmLTj4OsKweruEU6YoW6SWeXmulvdovdqQ0-Bgw2qlN2LpxwIZxgftw8EHKOTcRgNn7MPxtH4OKI1cv7WaqNnDhtX1kOyblQn9rt4SV-AQBezAXGz317MtD0Bdz1fX3aYUmrIcppIMm9snGDPTtlki95MHhFKry1AK_AUNeD9wrBh43JFI58d_PoFNHrjw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=Y_RhQ__5StBIODZPoxt7Hls9lQxpR7PEy0lfWwhgcHsEBKXNeMfWJOKPho3QuQyaCcg8QcSjj9E8tGcWnJGh-3LVEJWxP0Ei8WUjoMlBy_wxpQeSCmG-pIlGamBLWYHcVfXpB5T1UOug5ZQcodM-LW3I8-tUbpTFNeDCJLISTYbce4D4heSaWrpzyUIzzxK3CS6HBf6hDH4RKCazz9n7sBy2OWsjlHiZB3Cv9sBgYWDkgp8xL4khhMzhPlfLCIDT) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=693255e842c44ff99ad7f4223abee57a&_e=Y_RhQ__5StBIODZPoxt7Hls9lQxpR7PEy0lfWwhgcHsEBKXNeMfWJOKPho3QuQyaCcg8QcSjj9E8tGcWnJGh-3LVEJWxP0Ei8WUjoMlBy_wxpQeSCmG-pIlGamBLWYHcVfXpB5T1UOug5ZQcodM-LW3I8-tUbpTFNeDCJLISTYbce4D4heSaWrpzyUIzzxK3CS6HBf6hDH4RKCazz9n7sBy2OWsjlHiZB3Cv9sBgYWDkgp8xL4khhMzhPlfLCIDT) to unsubscribe. clean_body: We're coming up on just 50 days until the election and we're working hard to win in November. Friend, I know you're busy so I’ll be quick. We're coming up on just 50 days until the election and we're working hard to win in November. I wanted to reach out to you again to put this email at the top of your inbox because I want YOU to join me: I know that together, with hard work, we can bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. I'd love to have you by my side. Will you join me? Leah \-------forwarded message below------- BRING THE WISCONSIN WAY TO WASHINGTON Email: Status: PENDING | Friend, We've got one mission in between now and November: to elect a new senator who can truly represent the Wisconsin Way! And the reason why has never been more clear. Tammy Baldwin has extreme views that do NOT represent Wisconsin. She voted against Judge Gorsuch and wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before announcing she’d vote no on his appointment. She votes to spend our money recklessly and refuses to support tax cuts for the middle class. She campaigns for a complete socialized, government takeover of health care. And let's not forget how she did NOTHING when she learned that a doctor was over prescribing addictive opioids to veterans at the Tomah VA. I could go on and on. And I don't need to tell you, none of that is the Wisconsin Way. Let's just face it, Tammy Baldwin has let down the people she was elected to represent. Come November, we've got a chance to send Tammy Baldwin back to the private sector she doesn’t even know exists! We need a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working people who make our state, and our country what it is. Someone who KNOWS the Wisconsin Way. It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process. I will be that voice. I’m a mom with a cause, who is here because of circumstance – not ambition. While Tammy Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it. But it’s going to take all of us – united – to defeat Tammy. Now let's go win this thing! -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

My team just let me know we're still coming up about $705 short. We rely on top supporters like you to help build the grassroots movement we need to turn Congress blue.

This election is quickly coming to a head, and we simply can't afford to fall short. Can I count on you to step up before midnight?

Derek,

At the end of this month, Tim takes the stage to face his opponent, Corey Stewart, about issues that matter most to Virginians. And if it's anything like last time, Corey will keep the lies flowing on that debate stage - _but Tim will be prepared for anything._

Tickets for the event are "invite-only," but our campaign has set aside two of our tickets to award to one lucky supporter who enters our contest before [midnight tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11fb/3e0906/73c309d0/3e36373d/754159673/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+midnight+tonight&utm_campaign=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3&source=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3") You'll get to sit with Tim's campaign team - including his wife Anne - as we cheer him on!

**So Derek - hurry and rush a donation of $5, $10, or whatever you can afford right now and you 'll be automatically entered to win two tickets to the debate and a chance to meet Tim:**
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11fb/3e0906/73c309d0/3e36373c/754159673/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3&source=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3")
The contest ends [tonight](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11fb/3e0906/73c309d0/3e363733/754159673/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/va-senate-debate-win?refcode=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3&source=20180914_2_FR_TEAM_Sweepstakes-3") so make sure you put in an entry (or five!) now.

Thanks for your support as always, and good luck!

_Team Kaine_

One (1) winner will receive two (2) tickets for the winner and the winner's guest to attend the 2018 Virginia Senatorial Debate on September 26, 2018 in McLean, Virginia (approximate retail value of prize: $300). Odds of winning depends on number of entries received.
