name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Our Revolution takes New York
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
The political revolution just swept out the most undemocratic state legislative body in the country.
#
Friends,
The political revolution just swept out the most undemocratic state legislative body in the country. _Nearly three times as many people voted_ in the Democratic primary as in 2014 and in deep blue New York, establishment Democrats who caucused with Republicans in the Independent Democratic Conference (IDC) were ousted in a wave that will propel **five Our Revolution-endorsed state senators** to Albany.
This revolution is happening all across the country. Candidates like Ben Jealous in Maryland, Stacey Abrams in Georgia, Andrew Gillum in Florida, and Paulette Jordan in Idaho, are running to flip their governors' mansions, while Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Sara Innamorato, Summer Lee, and Elizabeth Fiedler triumphed over establishment Democrats to champion authentic, progressive visions for their communities in Congress and state legislatures.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a907/bed43eb/77a66a2d/75fcb3b8/2789526187/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180914&noskip=true")
[**Primary season is now over - more than 80 Our Revolution candidates advanced to the general election and are running to change the balance of power in Congress and states across our country. There are just 53 days before the general election. Pitch in $5 today to help our progressive candidates win.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a907/bed43eb/77a66a2d/75fcb3b8/2789526187/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180914&noskip=true")
People are not just voting for names on a ballot, they are voting for what those names stand for: Medicare for All, fair and affordable housing, criminal justice reform, public education, strong infrastructure, and environmental justice. By leading with our values and putting people before politics, we have brought the American people onto our side. That's why Medicare for All, free college tuition and other policies are supported by a majority of Americans.
What we are doing goes far beyond any single election season and transcends any political party. It doesn't stop in Congress or a governor's mansion. Our allegiance is to our values, and we are fighting for them at every single level - like Jovanka Beckles in California, running for the State Assembly to take on skyrocketing housing costs and educational inequality.
Building our movement with local groups is transforming local politics. The door knocking, phone calls, texting and community organizing is lifting up candidates like **Alessandra Biaggi** , **Julia Salazar** , **Jessica Ramos** , **Zellnor Myrie** , and **Rachel May** , who all won last night. And it paves the way for the big progressive ideas that we will keep fighting for.
[**Last night's triumph over New York's IDC proves that we can elect people who will make the policies that change lives - but we need your support to do it. Make a $5 donation right now to help us organize the American people and turn out voters for the midterm elections on November 6.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a907/bed43eb/77a66a2d/75fcb3b8/2789526187/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180914&noskip=true")
The time to start believing is right now. You are the most powerful force in America.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a907/bed43eb/77a66a2d/75fcb3b8/2789526187/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180914&noskip=true")**

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a907/bed43eb/77a66a2d/75fcb3a4/2789526187/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Cecile Richards
subject: It's time to elect champions for reproductive health.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Stacey Abrams is exactly the kind of leader we need right now. She's a fierce advocate for reproductive health and a champion for Georgia's women and families. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa82a/34a064cc/cb19681/70e6e9a/1153748481/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friends, Last May, Stacey Abrams won a decisive victory in her primary election to be Georgia's next Governor, and she was heading full-speed into the general election. I had just stepped down from twelve years serving as President of Planned Parenthood, but I knew I still had to do everything I could to help ensure she won again in November. You see, Stacey Abrams is exactly the kind of leader we need right now. She's a fierce advocate for reproductive health and a champion for Georgia's women and families. Her record as Democratic Leader speaks volumes. **[Friends, Georgia- and our nation - needs leaders like Stacey Abrams now more than ever. Will you stand with me today and chip in $3 to support her campaign?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa82a/34a064cc/cb19681/70e6e9b/1153748481/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-september?refcode=IE091418-full")** Right now, progressive governors in states across the country are the first line of defense against Trump. They're standing up to block attempts to roll back the clock on women's health, to defund Planned Parenthood, and to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ Stacey Abrams is ready to fight for Georgia as Governor - in fact, she's already been a leader of that fight in the Georgia House of Representatives. She's fought for the 8,000 Georgians (of all races, socioeconomic backgrounds, and genders) who depend on Planned Parenthood for health care. Why? Because Stacey knows that ensuring access to the full range of reproductive health services is key to ensuring economic mobility for women across the state of Georgia. **[I know that as Governor, Stacey Abrams will set a new standard for the South at a time when we need her leadership the most. She's ready for the fight- if _we_ are ready to stand beside her. Please, donate $3 or whatever you can to help Stacey keep fighting.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa82a/34a064cc/cb19681/70e6e9b/1153748481/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-september?refcode=IE091418-full")** Fights for progress are never easy. I should know - I led a reproductive health care organization under more than one anti-women's health presidential administration. This work is critical if we're going to save women's rights and lives. That's why I'm proud to be in this fight with Stacey Abrams and proud to be fighting for Stacey Abrams to be the next Governor of Georgia. I hope you'll fight with me. Onward, Cecile Richards
Former President, Planned Parenthood Action Fund
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa82a/34a064cc/cb19681/70e6e9b/1153748481/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-september?refcode=IE091418-full")**

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Hey, are you an education voter?
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3707/9e00690/5aae70be/240173a7/3183505080/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&source=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner")
Friends,

With Florida schools back in session, I want to speak with you about my teachers, and how they made it possible for me to reach out to you today as a candidate for Governor of Florida.

I was a skinny kid who came from a big family -- I'm the fifth of seven children. Some of my teachers had my older brothers in the years before me, and from time to time they found themselves in trouble. Despite all of this, they saw potential in me that I didn't see in myself. They invested extra time in me, time they didn't get paid for, and encouraged me to set my sights higher -- on honors classes, then on Advanced Placement classes, and finally on college.

And that's what's so amazing about public school -- no matter what your situation is at home, you have a teacher who cares about you, who believes in you, and who is working to help you succeed.

It's tough to quantify what it means to have someone believe in you. But I know that it means a lot -- and that it's yet another thing that isn't taken into consideration when our state government evaluates our teachers and determines their pay.

Our teachers do so much more than what we could ever see from any test their students take. And when I'm Governor, I'm going to make sure that we end this unfair form of evaluation, along with the unfair merit pay system. I believe we should trust our teachers, provide them the tools and resources they need to manage their classrooms and build their lesson plans, and pay them fairly for doing the most important job on earth -- shaping the future of humanity.

**[If you agree, add your name to stand with me today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3707/9e00690/5aae70be/240173a6/3183505080/VEsE/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-education-091318?gpsid=13_55_3562&source=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&utm_campaign=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+add+your+name+to+stand+with")**

All of these years later, my teachers and mentors are still supporting me. Earlier in the campaign, Dean Byrd, Ms. Awbrey from Gainesville High School, and Ms. Linda Knight joined us for an event in Gainesville:

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3707/9e00690/5aae70be/240173b9/3183505080/VEsF/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-education-091318?gpsid=13_55_3562&source=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&utm_campaign=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3")
They helped shape me into the person I am today, and as Governor, I'm going to do better for them and every Florida teacher. They deserve it.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3707/9e00690/5aae70be/240173b8/3183505080/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-september-2018?gpsid=13_55_3561&refcode=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&utm_campaign=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3707/9e00690/5aae70be/240173bb/3183505080/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3707/9e00690/5aae70be/240173bd/3183505080/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner&source=em18_180913_edpet_fnd_gq_act__test_ettx_winner")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: It's working
body:
Here at YOUR Indiana Republican Party, we're out there talking to voters every day. We're knocking on doors, making phones and sharing our winning... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/its-working?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cbd8f9ad09&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_It's Working..._** Here at YOUR Indiana Republican Party, we're out there talking to voters every day. We're knocking on doors, making phone calls and sharing our winning message...and I have news for you: It's working.

In coordination with the Republican National Committee, this year our ground game is of unprecedented size and scope. Indiana's never seen anything like it. So far this year, we've already hit nearly HALF A MILLION doors and made 650,000 phone calls. That's a lot of doors and calls...

And we know we're on the right track because this week [a brand new poll from Fox News](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=81c1559571&e=1acd9bb3d6) shows that our U.S. Senate candidate, **Mike Braun** , has caught up with and SURPASSED Democrat Joe Donnelly.

Check out the numbers in the graphic above. We're successfully getting out the word about Braun -- a proven business leader and conservative outsider who's going to shake up business-as-usual in the Senate and be a consistent ally of**President Donald Trump** and Hoosiers values.

But we can't keep this momentum going without Hoosier Republicans like you on board. We really need the entire team -- whether you are talking with your neighbors, [sharing our information on social media](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=907a3ddfb5&e=1acd9bb3d6), [donating to support our efforts](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d7829e372&e=1acd9bb3d6), or [being part of our winning ground game](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=560e163ace&e=1acd9bb3d6).

In fact, there's a great way to get involved this weekend through the [National Day of Action](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0524051251&e=1acd9bb3d6). Republicans across the country will be talking with voters everywhere, and we'll be part of that work here in Indiana in every corner of the state. It's not too late to get in on the action!

[Sign up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6812bae24&e=1acd9bb3d6), and our team will reach out and get you plugged into a local event. Or if you're in Indy, we have [a big event in our state's capital](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61cbee8810&e=1acd9bb3d6) with Congresswoman Susan Brooks that you definitely don't want to miss.

Thank you for being part of team and helping make these efforts work...all in the name of more great government service for Hoosiers! Now let's get to work!

-Kyle Hupfer
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5b6bd03378&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Next Level Connections Making Headlines_**
Last week,**Governor Eric Holcomb** announced a game-changing plan to complete several major Indiana infrastructure goals that have been worked toward for years. It's called [Next Level Connections](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1534b1f776&e=1acd9bb3d6), and it's delivering major infrastructure wins for Hoosiers.

Next Level Connections includes:
* Expanding the availability of affordable, high-speed broadband in rural Indiana
* Finishing the last leg of I-69 three years early (by 2024)
* Making fewer stops between South Bend and Indianapolis, and improving U.S. 20 and U.S. 30
* Attracting more nonstop, international flights to Indiana
* Continuing to look toward building a fourth water port in Southern Indiana
* Increasing passenger rail service in Northwest Indiana

And it's generating positive reactions from Hoosiers and local leaders throughout the state! Check out a few of the headlines and stories here:
* [Op-Ed: Governor Gives Rural Indiana a Great Push](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=602a4e46e3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* [Hoosiers Applaud Rural Broadband Expansion](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d10e5fd8e3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* [Editorial: Governor's Announcement is Great News for the County](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=479398c1ba&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* [Next Level Connections Has Dividends for Generations](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b260559a4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Mike Braun Takes the Lead!_**
This week, our U.S. Senate candidate, **Mike Braun** , was busy meeting with Hoosiers across the state (including in Petersburg in Pike County, as pictured above) and continuing to press Democrat Joe Donnelly on whether he'll vote to confirm President Donald Trump's pick for the U.S. Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh (somehow, Democrat Donnelly is still telling Hoosiers he's undecided).

_That's while we all got some exciting news: The latest polling shows that**Mike Braun** hasn't just caught up with Democrat Donnelly -- he's taken the lead!!_

But we can't stop here. While we're making progress, there's still a lot more work to be done to make sure we're sending this conservative outsider to the U.S. Senate. Make sure you're sharing news from **Mike Braun** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=be676bd144&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=58b9999a80&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [sign-up to volunteer](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb17c56edd&e=1acd9bb3d6) to help share **Mike Braun's** message with our fellow Hoosiers!
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana Fact of the Week_**
---
|
---
| **_Your Dollar Goes Further in Indiana!_**
Indiana’s cost of living is among the lowest in the nation – allowing Hoosiers to take their dollar further. In fact, the Tax Foundation reports that [$100 can buy you the equivalent of $110.74 worth of goods in Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4f0b53d39&e=1acd9bb3d6), relative to national averages! Take that to the bank!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Tomorrow: National Day of Action!_**
Tomorrow, Republicans across the country will come together for the National Day of Action...talking with voters about why it's critical we elect Republicans up and down the ballot in November!

And Indiana's a big part of those efforts! Polling released this week shows **Mike Braun** catching and taking the lead against Democrat Donnelly! This proves that what we're doing is working, but we still need your help. **\-- > Sign up** [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9133f3d4a&e=1acd9bb3d6) to volunteer tomorrow to talk with voters in your community. Or **register** [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b732b49a9e&e=1acd9bb3d6) to attend our our big National Day of Action event in Indianapolis tomorrow. Let's make a difference for **Mike Braun, Connie Lawson, Kelly Mitchell, Tera Klutz** , and our entire Republican team!
---

---
| | **BREAKING: NBC reports Heidi Heitkamp 's Senate seat most likely to flip Red! **
---
**[_Donate now to DOUBLE your gift, reelect Heidi in North Dakota and turn the Senate BLUE!_](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e5619/688a0c21/5638a132/73af2dff/1674115640/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGhoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTM3LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4hh?refcode=jtk1937-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
Friends -

Things are looking grim. If Heidi Heitkamp loses in North Dakota, Democrats stand no chance of taking back the Senate. And Heidi's seat is THE most likely to flip Republican - unless we act RIGHT NOW.

Heidi is the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the Senate, and the odds are stacked against her:
| | | | Heidi's race was the closest of 2012. She won by **just under 3,000 votes. ** |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Twenty-one right-wing groups have already spent nearly $10 million on ads to defeat her. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | But a group of generous donors is matching all online gifts until TOMORROW to help Heidi fight back against the GOP and win! |
---|---|---|---

name: Molly Kelly
subject: Do not underestimate me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
We've officially begun our final push, friends.
If you've been wondering when the right time to give is, _it's now._ **[_I need you to give $5 - or whatever you can spare - right now to help me flip New Hampshire blue._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4987/d0ce7de/51b9fe8c/9cd786b/1562939326/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTMxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk131-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'll be honest with you: Some people believe I'm the underdog in this race. I'm up against Governor Chris Sununu and the deep pockets of his wealthy corporate donors, who are doing everything they can to make sure they're able to keep pushing their agenda in the Granite State.
**But I've got a message for Sununu and his right-wing corporate allies:** ** **
**_Do not underestimate me and the power of this grassroots campaign._**
We're going to show everyone what is possible this year. **That's why I need you to give right now to reach our $7,500 goal before midnight so we can head strongly into November and flip New Hampshire blue. **
[Friends, we need to raise $7,500 before midnight if we're going to pull off this win. Please, give $5 or more right now.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4987/d0ce7de/51b9fe8c/9cd786b/1562939326/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTMxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk131-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
